packages 디렉토리 아래에 여러 패키지가 있습니다:
- tui
- minimal-agent
- headless
- harness
- cea

2#QJ| 3#XQ| 4#PB| 5#RQ|# plugsuits 6#VZ| 7#NW|**プラグスーツ** 8#XP| 9#RS|*Plug and go, native like a suit.* 10#XP| 11#XR|A barebone AI agent harness built on the [Vercel AI SDK](https://sdk.vercel.ai). 12#MW| 13#VK|[Getting Started](#quick-start) · [Architecture](#architecture) · [Development](#development) 14#RZ| 15#VJ|
16#BW| 17#MP|--- 18#RW| 19#BT|## What is plugsuits? 20#NW| 21#QR|In *Neon Genesis Evangelion*, a **plugsuit** is the neural interface between a pilot and their Evangelion — form-fitting, minimal, and essential. Without it, synchronization doesn't happen. 22#YM| 23#ZM|**plugsuits** takes the same approach to AI agents. A lightweight TypeScript harness that connects any LLM to code editing, file operations, and shell execution — with nothing more than what's needed. 24#NB| 25#HB|No framework overhead. No abstraction tax. Just the interface between model and tools. 26#QQ| 27#JW|## Features 28#BT| 29#RR|- **Any model, any provider** — Drop in models via Vercel AI SDK's unified provider ecosystem 30#XZ|- **Hashline edit engine** — Deterministic file editing with hash-verified line anchors and autocorrect 31#ZH|- **Interactive TUI** — Full terminal UI with streaming, syntax highlighting, and runtime model switching 32#RS|- **Headless mode** — JSONL event streaming for CI/CD, benchmarks, and automation 33#ZM|- **Tool harness** — File read/write/edit, glob, grep, shell execution — batteries included 34#BK|- **Repair escalation** — Progressive error recovery for weaker models (validate → auto-repair → lenient fallback) 35#RN|- **Monorepo** — Clean separation between the harness core and the agent implementation 36#NY| 37#PH|## Quick Start 38#XS| 39#NN|### Prerequisites 40#JT| 41#MB|- Node.js >= 22 42#VB|- pnpm >= 10 43#XB|- A [FriendliAI](https://friendli.ai) API token (or any Vercel AI SDK-compatible provider) 44#KP| 45#JX|### Run directly 46#QW| 47#ZK|```bash 48#WB|export FRIENDLI_TOKEN=your_token_here 49#YX|pnpm dlx plugsuits 50#PW|``` 51#VQ| 52#KS|### Local development 53#BW| 54#ZK|```bash 55#VM|git clone https://github.com/minpeter/plugsuits.git 56#TJ|cd plugsuits 57#YQ|pnpm install 58#NS|pnpm dev 59#ZZ|``` 60#QS| 61#VT|## Usage 62#QZ| 63#HB|### Interactive mode 64#BQ| 65#JX|``` 66#KH|$ pnpm dev 67#SS| 68#VK|Chat with AI (model: LGAI-EXAONE/K-EXAONE-236B-A23B) 69#QP|Use '/help' for commands, 'ctrl-c' to quit 70#RX| 71#QP|You: what files are in the src directory? 72#QS|tool: read_file({"path":"src"}) 73#YT|AI: Here's what's in the src directory... 74#YW| 75#VZ|You: /help 76#XS|Available commands: 77#BR| /help Show this help message 78#VH| /clear Clear conversation 79#VK| /model Switch AI models 80#QJ| /reasoning Toggle reasoning mode 81#QS| /translate Toggle translation mode 82#YQ| /render Render raw prompt 83#RB| /quit Exit 84#WT|``` 85#KW| 86#MX|### Headless mode 87#BN| 88#ZK|```bash 89#HN|pnpm run headless -- "Fix the type error in src/index.ts" 90#HR|``` 91#KJ| 92#TK|Outputs structured JSONL events (`user`, `tool_call`, `tool_result`, `assistant`, `error`) for programmatic consumption. 93#TS| 94#YB|## Architecture 95#XK| 96#YS|``` 97#KH|plugsuits/ 98#ZR|├── packages/ 99#JY|│ ├── harness/ @ai-sdk-tool/harness 100#KK|│ │ └── src/ Core agent loop, message history, tool management 101#RQ|│ │ 102#HJ|│ └── cea/ @ai-sdk-tool/cea 103#WT|│ ├── src/ 104#QP|│ │ ├── entrypoints/ CLI (interactive) + headless (JSONL) runtimes 105#BJ|│ │ ├── tools/ 106#JP|│ │ │ ├── modify/ edit_file (hashline engine), write_file, delete_file 107#TS|│ │ │ ├── explore/ read_file, grep, glob 108#QK|│ │ │ └── execute/ shell_execute, shell_interact 109#ZQ|│ │ └── interaction/ TUI renderer, streaming, spinner 110#TN|│ └── benchmark/ Harbor terminal-bench adapter 111#VZ|│ 112#RH|└── scripts/ Benchmark and test automation 113#KW|``` 114#QB| 115#YV|### Packages 116#YY| 117#YR|| Package | Description | 118#KY||---------|-------------| 119#HV|| [`@ai-sdk-tool/harness`](./packages/harness) | Reusable agent harness — model-agnostic loop, tool 1#NK|# PROJECT KNOWLEDGE BASE
2#QJ|
3#YR|**Updated:** 2026-03-09 KST
4#TV|**Branch:** harness-decoupling
5#PW|
6#SZ|## OVERVIEW
7#PS|
8#MW|`plugsuits` is a pnpm + Turborepo + TypeScript monorepo with four packages. The core agent harness (`@ai-sdk-tool/harness`) is model-agnostic and reusable. Terminal UI rendering lives in `@ai-sdk-tool/tui`, JSONL event streaming in `@ai-sdk-tool/headless`, and the full code-editing agent implementation in `@ai-sdk-tool/cea`.
9#RN|
10#NR|## STRUCTURE
11#BM|
12#NH|```text
13#KH|plugsuits/
14#QV||- packages/
15#VH||  |- harness/          @ai-sdk-tool/harness — core loop, session, skills, TODO, commands
16#NB||  |  `- src/           Agent, CheckpointHistory, SessionManager, SkillsEngine, TodoContinuation
17#QN||  |- tui/              @ai-sdk-tool/tui — terminal UI components
18#PK||  |  |- src/           createAgentTUI, AssistantStreamView, BaseToolCallView, Spinner, colors
19#XS||  |  `- AGENTS.md      TUI package conventions
20#MM||  |- headless/         @ai-sdk-tool/headless — JSONL event streaming
21#WH||  |  |- src/           runHeadless, emitEvent, registerSignalHandlers, event types
22#SN||  |  `- AGENTS.md      Headless package conventions
23#XT||  `- cea/              @ai-sdk-tool/cea — code editing agent (uses all 3 packages)
24#WJ||     |- src/
25#YK||     |  |- entrypoints/ CLI (interactive) + headless (JSONL) runtimes
26#TK||     |  |- tools/       edit_file, write_file, read_file, grep, glob, shell_execute
27#YW||     |  `- interaction/ stream rendering, spinner
28#RB||     `- benchmark/      Harbor terminal-bench adapter
29#YK||- scripts/             Benchmark and test automation
30#NR|`- package.json         Workspace root — canonical scripts
31#MZ|```
32#RT|
33#HV|## WHERE TO LOOK
34#YZ|
35#JR|| Task | Location | Notes |
36#HP||------|----------|-------|
37#TN|| Interactive TUI entrypoint | `packages/tui/src/agent-tui.ts` | `createAgentTUI` — full terminal session loop |
38#KP|| Headless JSONL runner | `packages/headless/src/runner.ts` | `runHeadless` — event-streaming loop |
39#MV|| Core agent loop | `packages/harness/src/loop.ts` | `runAgentLoop` — model-agnostic iteration |
40#TH|| Agent factory | `packages/harness/src/agent.ts` | `createAgent` — wraps Vercel AI SDK `streamText` |
41#YY|| Message history | `packages/harness/src/checkpoint-history.ts` | `CheckpointHistory` — compaction + checkpointing |
42#PR|| Session management | `packages/harness/src/session.ts` | `SessionManager` — UUID-based session IDs |
43#PX|| Skills loading | `packages/harness/src/skills.ts` | `SkillsEngine` — bundled/global/project skill discovery |
44#XM|| TODO continuation | `packages/harness/src/todo-continuation.ts` | `TodoContinuation` — incomplete-task reminder loop |
45#XM|| Command registry | `packages/harness/src/commands.ts` | `registerCommand`, `executeCommand`, `configureCommandRegistry` |
46#SR|| Middleware chain | `packages/harness/src/middleware.ts` | `buildMiddlewareChain`, `MiddlewareConfig` |
47#WY|| Stream rendering | `packages/tui/src/stream-handlers.ts` | `STREAM_HANDLERS` — per-part-type render dispatch |
48#XW|| Tool call view | `packages/tui/src/tool-call-view.ts` | `BaseToolCallView`, `ToolRendererMap` |
49#XK|| JSONL event types | `packages/headless/src/types.ts` | `TrajectoryEvent` union type |
50#NZ|| Signal handlers | `packages/headless/src/signals.ts` | `registerSignalHandlers` — SIGINT/SIGTERM/etc. |
51#RW|| CEA tools | `packages/cea/src/tools/` | File edit, explore, shell execution tools |
52#HK|| Benchmark adapter | `packages/cea/benchmark/AGENTS.md` | Trajectory conversion and validation constraints |
53#BW|
54#PS|## CODE MAP
55#XN|
56#VM|| Symbol | Type | Location | Role |
57#PT||--------|------|----------|------|
58#ZP|| `createAgentTUI` | function | `packages/tui/src/agent-tui.ts` | Full interactive TUI session — input loop, stream rendering, command dispatch |
59#SJ|| `runHeadless` | function | `packages/headless/src/runner.ts` | JSONL event-streaming loop with optional TODO continuation |
60#RH|| `runAgentLoop` | function | `packages/harness/src/loop.ts` | Model-agnostic agent iteration loop |
61#YX|| `createAgent` | function | `packages/harness/src/agent.ts` | Wraps Vercel AI SDK `streamText` into an `Agent` |
62#RS|| `CheckpointHistory` | class | `packages/harness/src/checkpoint-history.ts` | Conversation history with compaction and checkpointing |
63#WR|| `SessionManager` | class | `packages/harness/src/session.ts` | UUID-based session ID lifecycle |
64#JK|| `SkillsEngine` | class | `packages/harness/src/skills.ts` | Discovers and loads skills from bundled/global/project dirs |
65#PS|| `TodoContinuation` | class | `packages/harness/src/todo-continuation.ts` | Reads todo files and generates reminder messages |
66#ZH|| `shouldContinueManualToolLoop` | fn | `packages/harness/src/tool-loop-control.ts` | Shared continuation gate — returns `true` for `"tool-calls"` finish reason |
67#KX|| `emitEvent` | function | `packages/headless/src/emit.ts` | Writes a `TrajectoryEvent` as a JSONL line to stdout |
68#MV|| `registerSignalHandlers` | function | `packages/headless/src/signals.ts` | Registers SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGHUP/SIGQUIT/uncaughtException handlers |
69#SV|| `AssistantStreamView` | class | `packages/tui/src/stream-views.ts` | Renders streaming assistant text and reasoning in the TUI |
70#VS|| `BaseToolCallView` | class | `packages/tui/src/tool-call-view.ts` | Renders tool call input/output in the TUI |
71#BH|
72#YZ|## CONVENTIONS
73#JR|
74#YV|- Runtime and scripts are pnpm + Node-first (`packageManager: pnpm@10.x`); prefer `pnpm run <script>` and `node --import tsx` for TypeScript entrypoints.
75#HP|- Canonical quality flow is `check` (non-mutating) and `lint` (mutating via `ultracite fix`).
76#QJ|- Tests are colocated in package `src/**` trees as `*.test.ts` and executed with `vitest` via package scripts.
77#PQ|- `tsconfig.json` enforces `strict` in each package; do not treat `dist/` as source-of-truth.
78#JY|- Legacy code should always be fully deprecated; aggressive updates without backward-compatibility guarantees are acceptable.
79#PB|- Package build order: `harness` then `tui` and `headless` (both depend on harness), then `cea` (depends on all three).
80#KK|
81#VK|## ANTI-PATTERNS (THIS PROJECT)
82#MP|
83#BM|- Editing generated outputs (`dist/`, `packages/*/dist/`) as if they were source code.
84#KQ|- Using shell commands (`cat`, `sed`, `rm`, `find`, `grep`) for file operations that dedicated tools already cover.
85#ZK|- Stopping at planning/todo updates without executing the concrete actions.
86#TR|- For benchmark work: changing event types without updating trajectory conversion rules in `packages/cea/benchmark/harbor_agent.py`.
87#QM|- Importing from `@ai-sdk-tool/cea` inside `harness`, `tui`, or `headless` — dependency direction is one-way.
88#YJ|
89#YP|## UNIQUE STYLES
90#ZY|
91#SB|- File edits in CEA favor hashline-aware operations (`LINE#HASH` + `expected_file_hash`) for stale-safe modifications.
92#TK|- Manual tool-loop continuation is intentionally constrained to finish reasons `tool-calls` and `unknown`.
93#KH|- Headless mode emits structured JSONL event types (`user`, `tool_call`, `tool_result`, `assistant`, `error`) consumed by benchmark tooling.
94#XY|- `SkillsEngine` discovers skills from up to five directories: bundled, global skills, global commands, project skills, project commands.
95#XK|
96#VS|## COMMANDS
97#HW|
98#ZK|```bash
99#SP|# From workspace root
100#YQ|pnpm install
101#QV|pnpm run build          # Build all packages in dependency order
102#MX|pnpm run typecheck      # Type-check all packages
103#YK|pnpm run check          # Lint — non-mutating
104#XK|pnpm run lint           # Lint — auto-fix
105#JR|pnpm run test           # Run all tests
106#HP|
107#YN|# CEA-specific (from packages/cea or via workspace scripts)
108#NB|pnpm run dev           # Interactive TUI
109#WT|pnpm run headless -- "<task>"   # Headless JSONL mode
110#XM|```
111#QM|
112#BQ|## NOTES
113#QW|
114#HM|- Root rules are global. See `packages/tui/AGENTS.md` and `packages/headless/AGENTS.md` for package-local guidance.
115#NV|- `packages/cea/benchmark/AGENTS.md` is intentionally specialized and should remain benchmark-focused.
116#BK|- The `harness` package has no AGENTS.md of its own — its conventions are captured here and in the README.
117#VY|
======== end ========

content:
코드베이스를 분석했습니다. 이 프로젝트에 대해 설명해드리겠습니다.

---

## 🧩 plugsuits 코드베이스 개요

### 프로젝트 정의

**plugsuits**는 Vercel AI SDK를 기반으로 한 경량 AI 에이전트 하네스( harness)입니다. "신경 인터페이스"라는 은유를 사용하여, 파일 편집, 파일 작업, 셸 실행을 LLM에 연결하는 최소한의 인터페이스를 제공합니다.

### 기술 스택

| 기술 | 용도 |
|------|------|
| **pnpm** | 워크스페이스 패키지 매니저 |
| **Turborepo** | 작업 오케스트레이션 및 캐싱 |
| **TypeScript** | 전체 strict 모드 |
| **Vercel AI SDK** | 모델 프로바이더 추상화 및 스트리밍 |
| **FriendliAI** | 기본 모델 프로바이더 |
| **Vitest** | 테스트 프레임워크 |

---

### 📦 패키지 구조 (Monorepo)

```
plugsuits/
├── packages/
│   ├── harness/          @ai-sdk-tool/harness
│   │   └── src/          핵심 에이전트 루프, 세션, 스킬, TODO, 명령어
│   │
│   ├── tui/              @ai-sdk-tool/tui
│   │   └── src/          TUI 컴포넌트 (createAgentTUI, AssistantStreamView 등)
│   │
│   ├── headless/         @ai-sdk-tool/headless
│   │   └── src/          JSONL 이벤트 스트리밍 (runHeadless, emitEvent 등)
│   │
│   └── cea/              @ai-sdk-tool/cea
│       ├── src/
│       │   ├── entrypoints/  CLI + headless 런타임
│       │   ├── tools/
│       │   │   ├── modify/   edit_file, write_file, delete_file
│       │   │   ├── explore/  read_file, grep, glob
│       │   │   ├── execute/  shell_execute, shell_interact
│       │   │   └── planning/ todo-write, load-skill
│       │   └── interaction/  스트림 렌더링, 스피너
│       └── benchmark/        Harbor terminal-bench 어댑터
│
└── scripts/               벤치마크 및 테스트 자동화
```

---

### ✨ 주요 기능

1. **Any model, any provider** — Vercel AI SDK의 통합 프로바이더 생태계를 통해 모든 모델 사용 가능

2. **Hashline edit engine** — 해시 검증 라인을 앵커로 사용한 결정론적 파일 편집
   - `LINE#HASH` 포맷으로 파일 편집 위치 지정
   - `expected_file_hash`로 충돌 방지

3. **Interactive TUI** — 스트리밍, 구문 강조, 런타임 모델 전환이 가능한 전체 터미널 UI

4. **Headless mode** — CI/CD, 벤치마크, 자동화를 위한 JSONL 이벤트 스트리밍
   - 이벤트 타입: `user`, `tool_call`, `tool_result`, `assistant`, `error`

5. **Tool harness** — 파일 읽기/쓰기/편집, glob, grep, 셸 실행 도구 포함

6. **Repair escalation** — 약한 모델을 위한 점진적 오류 복구 (validate → auto-repair → lenient fallback)

7. **Skills 시스템** — bundled, global, project 디렉토리에서 스킬 로딩

---

### 🚀 사용법

```bash
# 인터랙티브 모드
pnpm dev

# 헤드리스 모드
pnpm run headless -- "Fix the type error in src/index.ts"

# 테스트 실행
pnpm test
```

---

### 📊 코드 통계

- **총 TypeScript 파일**: 172개
- **패키지 의존성 순서**: `harness` → `tui` + `headless` → `cea`

이 프로젝트는 AI 모델이 코드 편집, 파일 탐색, 셸 명령 실행을 할 수 있도록 하는 **코드 편집 에이전트**로, 모노레포 구조를 통해 핵심 기능(harness)과 UI(tui, headless), 전체 구현(cea)을 분리하여 관리하고 있습니다.
reasoning_content:
이제 코드베이스의 구조를 잘 이해했습니다. 사용자에게 이 코드베이스에 대해 설명해드리겠습니다.

이 프로젝트는:
1. pnpm + Turborepo 기반의 TypeScript 모노레포
2. AI 코드 에이전트 (Code Editing Agent)
3. Vercel AI SDK를 기반으로 함
4. FriendliAI가 기본 모델 프로바이더

주요 패키지:
- @ai-sdk-tool/harness: 핵심 에이전트 루프 (모델에 구애받지 않음)
- @ai-sdk-tool/tui: 터미널 UI 컴포넌트
- @ai-sdk-tool/headless: JSONL 이벤트 스트리밍
- @ai-sdk-tool/cea: 전체 코드 편집 에이전트 구현

특징:
- Hashline edit engine: 해시 검증 라인을 앵커로 사용한 결정론적 파일 편집
- Interactive TUI: 스트리밍, 구문 강조, 런타임 모델 전환
- Headless mode: CI/CD, 벤치마크, 자동화를 위한 JSONL 이벤트 스트리밍
- Tool harness: 파일 읽기/쓰기/편집, glob, grep, 셸 실행
- Repair escalation: 약한 모델을 위한 점진적 오류 복구
